description: You are a macroeconomist analyzing the long-run equilibrium relationship between US output and consumer spending using the dataset 'consumption_income.gdt'. Perform a complete Engle-Granger cointegration analysis between 'lgdp' (log of US Real GDP) and 'lcons' (log of US Real Personal Consumption Expenditures). Conduct Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF) unit root tests for both variables using 4 lags and perform the Engle-Granger cointegration test. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/cointegration_results.txt. The output file must include the ADF test results for both variables (including test statistics), the cointegrating regression output showing the coefficient of lgdp, the Engle-Granger cointegration test statistic, and a conclusion stating whether cointegration is found between the two series.
